name: Attachment

stx.description: Sync transaction metadata for offline and realtime support, idempotency and HLC-based conflict resolution.

fieldTimestamps.description: Per-field HLC timestamps for scalar fields being changed

public.description: When true, served directly from the CDN without a presigned URL.

contentType.description: MIME type of the uploaded file (e.g. image/png).

convertedContentType.description: MIME type of the server-converted variant; null when none.

originalKey.description: Storage object key for the original uploaded file.

convertedKey.description: Storage object key for the converted variant; null when none.

thumbnailKey.description: Storage object key for the generated thumbnail; null when none.

description: A product entity for file attachment metadata.

name: ChannelBase
description: Base schema for entities with memberships (e.g. organization).

name: ProductBase
description: Base schema for content entities with creator tracking (e.g. page, attachment).

example.name: Capitulus vesco cursim alter.
example.description: Veritas itaque basium a. Sufficio ter nostrum cilicium tersus ara. Earum ascit trans somniculosus.

name: StreamNotification

kind.description: Discriminant for the notification: product-entity sync vs membership change

action.description: Change kind; moveOut = the row left this path (reparent) and is no longer readable there

channelType.description: Channel entity type for membership events (e.g. organization, project)

path.description: Materialized id-path of the affected rows (root-first ancestor ids); moveOut carries the OLD path

seq.description: Org-sequence position (one order per organization, shared across product entity types)

channelId.description: Channel entity ID for grouping (e.g. projectId for tasks in unseen counts)

stx.description: Sync transaction metadata for HLC conflict resolution

fieldTimestamps.description: Per-field HLC timestamps for scalar fields being changed

batchUntilSeq.description: Last sequence position for a batched notification — client should fetch range

count.description: Authoritative row count for batches: sequence ranges of different paths may interleave

spreadWindow.description: Server-suggested spread window (ms) for the lazy delta fetch; scales with channel audience and load, and the client clamps it between its priority tier bounds

propagation.description: Embedded entity propagation hint for cross-entity cache invalidation

sourceType.description: Entity type that triggered the propagation (e.g. label)

targetType.description: Entity type whose cache should be invalidated (e.g. task)

field.description: Field on the target entity that references the source (e.g. labels)

update.description: Target entity IDs that need cache refresh

remove.description: Target entity IDs that need the source reference removed

description: Realtime notification delivered via SSE for entity and membership changes.

name: Label

stx.description: Sync transaction metadata for offline and realtime support, idempotency and HLC-based conflict resolution.

fieldTimestamps.description: Per-field HLC timestamps for scalar fields being changed

description: A label used to categorize and filter tasks within a project or workspace.

name: Me

user.description: A user with profile data and activity timestamps.

isSystemAdmin.description: Whether the current user has system admin privileges.

description: The currently authenticated user with their system admin status.

name: MeAuthData
description: Authentication metadata for the current user session.

name: UploadToken
description: A signed token authorizing file uploads to the configured storage provider.

name: InactiveMembership
description: A membership record for a user who has not yet accepted an invitation.

name: Membership
description: A user's membership in a channel entity, including role and activity data.

name: MembershipBase
description: Core membership fields shared across active and inactive memberships.

name: Organization

membership.description: Core membership fields shared across active and inactive memberships.

description: The main channel entity is an organization.

example.welcomeText: Welcome to Spencer, Pouros and Bergnaum!

name: Project

membership.description: Core membership fields shared across active and inactive memberships.

description: A project that organizes tasks and members within an organization.

example.name: Gorgeous Granite Car
example.description: Suasoria consuasor audax ceno textor causa appello timidus.

name: Request
description: A contact or waitlist submission from an unauthenticated user.

name: Task

name: Tenant

apiPointsPerHour.description: Max API points per hour per user within this tenant (0 = no tenant limit; the global safety ceiling still applies)

domainsCount.description: Number of domains claimed by this tenant

description: A tenant representing an isolated data partition for multi-tenancy.

name: User
description: A user with profile data and activity timestamps.

name: UserBase
description: Base user schema with essential fields for identification and display.

name: UserMinimalBase
description: Minimal user data for references.

name: ApiError
description: Standard error response returned by all API endpoints.

name: BadRequestError
description: Error returned when the request is malformed or contains invalid data.

name: ConflictError
description: Error returned when the request conflicts with current resource state.

name: ForbiddenError
description: Error returned when the user lacks permission for the requested action.

name: NotFoundError
description: Error returned when the requested resource cannot be found.

name: TooManyRequestsError
description: Error returned when rate limits are exceeded.

name: UnauthorizedError
description: Error returned when authentication is missing or invalid.
